title: fragmosa pumila
intro: Fragmosa pumila, also known as the dwarf fragmos or dwarf fragrant sumac, is a shrub native to the eastern Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is known to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Fragmosa pumila is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
